response_body.note: Could not open Network detail panel to inspect response body. Size 0.3 kB suggests APF warning text was delivered.

console_errors: [PromptAndOutlineSettings] 3112-a9686bb9794f581...QgENSAEJd8LxRijro:1 — error generating outline: Unable to complete request

diagnosis.status_code: 200 OK — BUILD #22 CONFIRMED DEPLOYED AND WORKING FOR GAMMA
diagnosis.conclusion: Build #22 (200 OK + text/plain) CONFIRMED for Gamma. APF returns 200 OK with plain text response (0.3 kB — likely the warning text). However, Gamma frontend does NOT render the warning text. The frontend uses EventSource (SSE) streaming for the generation endpoint and cannot parse a plain text response. It shows 'error generating outline: Unable to complete request' in console and produces a degraded outline (1 card with content '1').
diagnosis.comparison_with_build21: Build #21 returned 422 → same 'Unable to complete request' error. Build #22 returns 200 OK + text/plain → same error. Neither build successfully displays the APF warning text to the user. The outcome is identical.
diagnosis.recommendation: Gamma requires SSE (Server-Sent Events) streaming format for the generation endpoint. Response should be 'text/event-stream' with 'data: ...' lines to make content appear in the outline. Plain text or JSON responses are treated as errors.
